app_subtitle: Slowly reveal what your heart really feels
exit_message:
Your answers will not be saved.
If you restart, the reading begins again from the first question.
preview:
You are someone who values relationships.
But that kindness may be pushing your feelings aside.
hook: Beyond this point, your hidden inner truth appears
warning: You may need a little courage
daily_limit: This reading is available once per day
paid_sub: We will read your emotional flow
type_self_abandon: You tend to abandon your own needs too much.
type_empathy: You tend to prioritize others too much.
type_suppression: You tend to suppress your feelings.
type_guarded: You tend to protect your true feelings too deeply.
result_self_abandon:
[Essence]
You are sensitive to people's feelings and good at reading the atmosphere.

[Hidden Truth]
Deep down, you want to prioritize yourself a little more.

[Problem]
Your kindness is so strong that you no longer notice your own limits.

[Advice]
Before responding to someone's expectations, check your own exhaustion first.

You can still reclaim yourself.
result_empathy:
[Essence]
You value relationships.

[Hidden Truth]
You don't truly want approval.
You simply want safe human connection.

[Problem]
You adjust yourself too much.

[Advice]
Start with small NOs.

You are still growing.
result_suppression:
[Essence]
You tend to store emotions inside.

[Hidden Truth]
Part of you wants someone to truly understand you.

[Problem]
Your true feelings have become difficult to see.

[Advice]
Do not search for perfect words.
Write just one honest sentence.

You are not completely closed off.
result_overthink:
[Essence]
You have the ability to think deeply.

[Hidden Truth]
More than avoiding mistakes, you truly want peace of mind.

[Problem]
You think so much that you stop moving.

[Advice]
Take one small action before finding the perfect answer.

You can still move forward.
result_guarded:
[Essence]
You do not easily show your inner self.

[Hidden Truth]
You want to be understood without being hurt.

[Problem]
When your guard becomes too strong, even support feels distant.

[Advice]
You do not need to say everything.
Just choose one honest word.

Little by little, you can open up.
q1: Are you afraid of being disliked?
q2: Do you often hide your true feelings?
q3: Do you tend to carry problems alone?
q5: Is it hard for you to rely on others?
q7: Do you feel guilty saying no?
q9: Do you try too hard to meet expectations?
q10: Do you worry too much about others?
q11: Do you dwell on failures for a long time?
q13: Do you pretend to be okay in front of others?
q14: Do you keep thinking without finding answers?
q15: Do you sometimes lose sight of who you really are?
